steps: Go to https://uploadthing.com and click 'Sign in with GitHub'
After logging in, click 'Create a new app'
Enter your app name and select a storage region
Once the app is created, click on it to open the dashboard
In the left sidebar, click 'API Keys'
Click 'Create new API key', give it a name, and click 'Create'
Copy the API key — it will be used in the x-uploadthing-api-key header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: UploadThing API key passed in the x-uploadthing-api-key header

notes: Sign in with GitHub is the only authentication method
API key is sent in the x-uploadthing-api-key header (no prefix/Bearer)
Multiple API keys can be created per app for different environments
SDK v7 uses a combined token format (base64 JSON) — the raw API key is for direct REST calls

test_endpoint.description: Get current storage usage and limits for your UploadThing app
